{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Fisher Gesha's drudge
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha's drudge]] is a huge purple spider.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fisher Gesha]] has a [[drudge]] with eight metallic purple legs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
